---
title: "Intro to the UNIX shell"
author: Marie HIDJO
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---
  
## Slides


```{=html}
<iframe src="https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/e/2PACX-1vTMagosjL88dFPQ7ZRY83HmcU91qP7aYkytTi3v89U6jU4vmNp-gKhBtSxIUdCo3CJjhIoV94IU2z7Q/embed?start=false&loop=false&delayms=60000" frameborder="0" width="640" height="389" allowfullscreen="true" mozallowfullscreen="true" webkitallowfullscreen="true"></iframe>
```
